ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Reading frame of the sequence */,
  "beg" INTEGER /* Start position of the sequence */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the sequence */,
  "seq" TEXT /* The genetic sequence (e.g., ATGTGA) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sequence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sequence was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sequence (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "annotated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who annotated the sequence */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the sequence belongs to */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., research lab, clinical trial) */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* ID of the specific source within the source type */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the sequence belongs to */,
  "genomic_region" TEXT /* Genomic region (e.g., chromosome, plasmid) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sequence is public or private */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the sequence */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* External accession number (e.g., NCBI accession number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_annotated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the principal investigator belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the principal investigator was added */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal investigator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the principal investigator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the principal investigator account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the principal investigator's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., functional, structural) */,
  "annotation_description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "annotated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level for the annotation */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification event */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the modification was made */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the modification */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the modification */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user making the modification */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the modification has been reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Details of the version */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version has been reverted */,
  "reverted_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reverted the version */,
  "reverted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_reverted_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("reverted_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the sequence file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., FASTA, VCF) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key if the file is encrypted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_files_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role in the project */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the project */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active in the project */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
